note: Adventure keyed area / point of interest (AX line). Prose flows from the entry heading to the next heading (column flow, per-para page for spillover). AX2 tags paragraphs with inline icon runs ([MONSTER], [LORE], ...) which become section labels; inset Note boxes section as note; indented 'Name:' quick-stat clusters section as stats and also emit creature refLists. Binding routes to a journal page; meta.group names the parent complex/district.
